slots.name: eyebrow
slots.notes: Small label above the main heading. E.g., 'Simple Pricing'

slots.name: section_title
slots.notes: Main heading, supports LineReveal on scroll

slots.name: section_subtitle
slots.notes: Secondary description supporting the main heading

slots.name: billing_toggle
slots.notes: Billing cycle switch toggle Monthly / Annual

slots.name: plans
slots.notes: List of pricing tiers: { name, price, price_annual?, description, features[], cta_label, featured?, color_theme?, programs?, illustration? }

slots.name: comparison_features
slots.notes: Detailed features list for tabular matrix comparisons: { feature_name, values[] }

slots.name: background_graphic
slots.notes: Underlay wavy curves, mesh grids, or background patterns

layout_variants.name: 3-Tier Glassmorphism Cards
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: 3-column pricing layout arranged neatly over a dark Slate background (#0B0F19). The recommended tier at the center stands out with an enlarged card scale, a subtle emerald border glow, and a curved 'Most Popular' banner. Adjacent cards use solid neutral-grey glassmorphism (backdrop-blur bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/10). Features large [Heading Font] bold pricing figures as visual anchors, with feature listings styled in [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Heading slides up. Step 2: Tier cards expand from center staggered with an 80ms delay. On scroll up: Cards shrink and fade out. Hover Interaction: Standard cards lift by 4px, while the featured card lifts by 6px with a reinforced ambient backdrop glow.

layout_variants.name: Color-Block Split Comparison Table (Ref 1)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Clean horizontal comparison board divided into two distinct color columns over a light gradient. The left column (white background) houses the Basic ($42) and Project ($50) plans, showing comparison features checkmarks in [Body Font]. The right column stands in contrast with a deep turquoise background (#189D91), housing the Startup ($96) plan with a bold 'Recommended' banner and the Growth ($120) plan with a white backdrop. Buttons are flat pill-shaped 'Select Plan' elements in [UI Font]. Entrance Animation: Left and right blocks slide in from respective sides, snapping together in the center. Price numbers slide up. On scroll up: Columns slide back towards the screen edges. Hover Interaction: Buttons bounce with spring dynamics, and card outlines glow.

layout_variants.name: High-Contrast Forest Green & Pastels (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Bold, high-contrast forest green (#044F2E) background with slowly twisting dark green curves. An elegant, classic cream [Heading Font] heading sits on top. Below are three vertical white cards (Free, Basic, Premium) aligned side-by-side. Each card features a vibrant orange plan label, a large sans-serif price figure, and a lime green (#A6FF35) 'Get Started' button. Feature lists are styled in [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: White cards slide up staggered from the bottom. Underlay wave shapes rotate slowly on scroll (multiplier: 0.15). On scroll up: Cards slide back down. Hover Interaction: Cards lift by 8px, and lime green buttons light up.

layout_variants.name: Stitched Border Dashboard plans (Ref 3)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Sleek dashboard-themed plans layout on a warm grey background. Three vertical cards sit side-by-side: left (Basic) and right (Master) use light grey outlines, while the center (Pro) features a dark charcoal background (#1F2128), a yellow stitched border detail, and a 'Save 27%' diagonal badge. Buttons are pill-shaped white blocks with dark text in [UI Font]. Entrance Animation: Pro card's stitched border draws around it (SVG path draw). Left/right cards slide outwards slightly. On scroll up: Stitched borders retract and cards gather to center. Hover Interaction: Pro card's stitched border blinks, and card tilts 3D under cursor.

layout_variants.name: Hand-Drawn Sunflower Evolution Matrix (Ref 4)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Notion-style minimal comparison matrix on a clean white background. A large serif heading is aligned left, with Free ($0), Explorer ($15), and Scholar ($25) plans to the right. Each plan is topped by a yellow hand-drawn 2D sunflower sketch: Free shows a drooping flower, Explorer shows a budding sprout, Scholar shows a blooming sunflower (illustrating plan progression). Below is a detailed feature comparison matrix separated by thin horizontal rules, with values in fine [Mono Font]. Entrance Animation: Sunflowers draw their outlines dynamically on scroll (800ms sketch draw). Comparison matrix rows slide up one-by-one. On scroll up: Sunflowers erase themselves and matrix collapses. Billing toggle switch: Price numbers transition smoothly.

layout_variants.name: Multi-Program Selector & Code Promo Cards (Ref 5)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Two oversized warm cream (#F9F8F3) cards side-by-side. Each card incorporates program selector tabs (Month-to-Month, 3-Month, 6-Month) in a horizontal pill-shaped bar. The 3-Month tab is styled in dark moss green with a yellow 'MOST POPULAR' badge. Pricing displays giant classic [Accent Serif Font] numbers (e.g. $189/month) with a light grey promo field below. Dark moss green 'Get Started' buttons sit at the bottom. Entrance Animation: Cards slide up staggered. On scroll up: Cards slide down. Program tab click: Price and promo fields update using a flip counter reveal (200ms easeOut), while the active tab background shifts.

line_reveal_header.intent: Header entrance effect: Step 1: Heading slides up (y: 24px -> 0px) and fades in (opacity: 0.1 -> 1.0) over 500ms on viewport trigger. On scroll up: Reverses animation to hide heading.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per offsetTop row

staggered_cards.intent: Pricing cards expand from center and slide up staggered from left to right.

sunflower_sketch.intent: Draws hand-sketched 2D sunflowers on scroll trigger when viewport is reached.

stitched_border_draw.intent: Draws the stitched border around the Pro plan on scroll trigger.

forest_waves_parallax.intent: Faded background green wave ornaments rotate on scroll (multiplier: 0.15), adding background depth.

billing_toggle_flip.intent: When monthly/annual billing cycle is toggled: old prices slide out vertically and new prices slide in from below (200ms AnimatePresence).

program_tab_switch.intent: When program tab is clicked: active tab background slides horizontally via spring layoutId, and prices flip counter-reveal.

card_3d_tilt.intent: Hovering on pricing card: card lifts (y: -6px), shadow deepens, and card tilts 3D following mouse coordinates.

tooltip_hover.intent: Hovering over the FAQ question mark icon: tooltip scales up and fades in from cursor.

badge_pulse_glow.intent: The 'Recommended' or 'Most Popular' badge pulses periodically every 2 seconds.

in.description: Pricing sections usually require contrasting backgrounds to direct focus on conversion goals (SaaS pricing card dark/light contrast).

out.description: Fades smoothly into adjacent FAQ or CTA banner sections.

flow.notes: Critical for SaaS and paid service landing pages. Can be bypassed for portfolios or simple lead-gen landing pages.
